name: Blueberry Buttermilk Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. In another bowl, whisk the eggs, buttermilk, and melted, browned butter.
3. Make a well in the dry ingredients and pour in the liquid mixture quickly.
4. Mix until combined.
5. Fold in the blueberries.
6. Spoon batter into greased muffin cups.
7. Bake at 400 degrees F for 20-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
